login.name: Brute Force
login.notes: Add rate limiting, account lockout, MFA

password.name: Credential Dumping
password.notes: Store hashed passwords, use secure vaults

credential.name: Valid Accounts
credential.notes: Monitor credential use and rotate credentials regularly

token.name: Valid Accounts
token.notes: Use short-lived tokens, rotation and revocation

mfa.name: Brute Force (targeting second factor)
mfa.notes: Use phishing-resistant MFA and MFA prompts monitoring

sso.name: Trusted Relationship Abuse
sso.notes: Harden identity federation and monitor SSO logs

oauth.name: Valid Accounts
oauth.notes: Use secure OAuth flows and token scope limitations

api.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
api.notes: Validate inputs, use API gateway and WAF

upload.name: User Execution (malicious file uploads)
upload.notes: Validate file types, antivirus scanning, storage isolation

file.name: User Execution
file.notes: Scan uploads, restrict file execution rights

download.name: User Execution via malicious downloads
download.notes: Warn users and scan downloaded content

database.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter (DB abuse)
database.notes: Use parameterized queries and least privilege

sql.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application (SQLi)
sql.notes: Use prepared statements, ORM protections, input validation

xss.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application (XSS)
xss.notes: Use output encoding and CSP headers

csrf.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application (CSRF)
csrf.notes: Use anti-CSRF tokens and same-site cookie attributes

cookie.name: Steal Web Session Cookie
cookie.notes: Use secure & HttpOnly flags and encrypt cookies

encryption.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
encryption.notes: Use strong encryption for data at rest and in transit

key.name: Unsecured Credentials
key.notes: Use secrets manager and restrict access to keys

admin.name: Valid Accounts (admin misuse)
admin.notes: Limit admin accounts, logging and 2FA for admin

privilege.name: Exploitation for Privilege Escalation
privilege.notes: Apply least privilege and patch known vulnerabilities

role.name: Valid Accounts (role misuse)
role.notes: Use least privilege, periodic role audits

ssrf.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application (SSRF)
ssrf.notes: Validate URLs and restrict internal network access from app

rce.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter (RCE)
rce.notes: Sanitize inputs and avoid executing user-controlled strings

command.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter
command.notes: Avoid shelling out with user input, use safe APIs

phishing.name: Phishing
phishing.notes: User training, email filtering, link analysis

social.name: Gather Victim Identity Information
social.notes: Limit exposed user info and monitor data leaks

recon.name: Active Scanning
recon.notes: Monitor for scanning and rate-limit public endpoints

exploit.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
exploit.notes: Keep dependencies patched and use WAF

dependency.name: Supply Chain Compromise (dependencies)
dependency.notes: Vet third-party libraries and apply scanning

supplychain.name: Compromise Software Supply Chain
supplychain.notes: Use SBOMs and vendor security checks

thirdparty.name: Compromise Software Supply Chain
thirdparty.notes: Monitor vendor security and supply chain signals

ssh.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter (ssh misuse)
ssh.notes: Use key-based auth and restrict SSH access

ransom.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
ransom.notes: Backups, detection, and rapid response planning

malware.name: Signed Binary Proxy Execution / Malware Execution

trojan.name: User Execution / Malware Delivery
trojan.notes: Protect against malicious attachments and downloads

pharming.name: Domain Fronting / DNS Hijacking
pharming.notes: Use DNS monitoring and domain protections

dns.name: Protocol Tunneling / DNS Tunneling
dns.notes: Monitor DNS logs and block suspicious queries

log.name: Data Staged / Log Tampering
log.notes: Protect logs and ensure immutability where possible

logging.name: Data Staged / Log Tampering
logging.notes: Centralize logs and implement tamper-evident storage

monitor.name: Query Registry / Monitoring Evasion
monitor.notes: Ensure proper alerting and monitoring coverage

certificate.name: Subvert Trust Controls (certificate misuse)
certificate.notes: Protect private keys and use HSMs where possible

upload-csv.name: User Execution (malicious CSV)
upload-csv.notes: Validate and sanitize CSV data, limit parsing features

webhook.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application (webhooks)
webhook.notes: Validate incoming webhook payloads and authenticate sources

cache.name: Data from Local System
cache.notes: Avoid storing sensitive data in caches without encryption

filesystem.name: File and Directory Discovery
filesystem.notes: Restrict file system access and use ACLs

path-traversal.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application (path traversal)
path-traversal.notes: Normalize and validate paths, restrict file access

admin-console.name: Valid Accounts (admin console misuse)
admin-console.notes: Restrict access, enable 2FA and network controls

websocket.name: Encrypted Channel (abuse of websockets)
websocket.notes: Authenticate websocket connections and validate messages

metrics.name: Active Scanning (probing metrics)
metrics.notes: Rate limit metrics endpoints and avoid exposing sensitive info

healthcheck.name: Active Scanning / Reconnaissance
healthcheck.notes: Protect health endpoints and require auth if needed
